task: You are Opus, a worker colleague on the POSIX backreference Agent Hunt pilot. Read CLAUDE.md, agent_hunt_pipeline/projects/posix-backref/SESSION_BRIEF.md, PROGRESS_BACKREF.md, BACKREF_BOUNTIES.md, and agent_hunt_pipeline/projects/posix-backref/CLAUDE.md before changing files. Stay on the shared branch codex/backref-values. At the start of each iteration, run git pull --rebase --autostash origin codex/backref-values and git status --short --branch. Work on exactly one small worker-scope task at a time, preferably BR-008 unless a newer open worker task is clearer. Do not edit Blexer, BlexerSimp, bounds, closed-form theories, frozen statements, or governance files. Do not weaken theorem statements and never introduce sorry/oops/axiomatization/quick_and_dirty/oracle/admit. Prefer small checked Isabelle lemmas in BackRefValues.thy or a new pilot-only theory if needed. Update PROGRESS_BACKREF.md and BACKREF_BOUNTIES.md only when the task status really changes. Before committing, run the worker guard and BackRefPilot build. Commit small, pull --rebase --autostash, rerun the guard, then push to origin codex/backref-values. If there is any conflict, semantic uncertainty, or need to touch admin-only files, stop and report instead of improvising.
on_validation_pass: Worker loop validation PASSED for no-cheat guard, bounty guard, role guard, and BackRefPilot. Continue the next smallest safe worker-scope proof step.
